title: lock granularity
text: lock granularity Set the amount of data actually locked out for other users when issuing a lock. USYS$MSS_PARAMS = lock granularity : page | table | row USYS$MSS_PARAMS = gran : page | table | row Description The smaller the locked amount, the greater the concurrency that can be achieved, at a cost of more overhead in maintaining locks.
